prompt: Split the UI mockup into three equal parts similar to the first image, and apply the UI mockup elements on the second part.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 2 (the Mountain Biking web template). Reformat Image 2 by dividing it into three equal vertical sections, mimicking the multi-panel screen layout of Image 1. Populate the central (second) vertical section of the newly segmented Image 2 with UI elements and content from Image 2, ensuring they are appropriately scaled and cleanly arranged within its boundaries.
objects: UI navigation elements (e.g., Events, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact Us)
Descriptive text blocks about mountain biking
